conversations.content: Today we studied the Jiahe Pharmaceutical Laboratory Quality Control System. If a quality inspector finds that the purity of a batch of active pharmaceutical ingredient is below the national standard...
Purity below national standard? This batch can't be released — depends on whether it was used.
And that batch of non-conforming raw material has already been mixed into three or more production lines.
Mixed into three lines? That impact is huge! What emergency authority does the quality director have?
then the quality director may order a plant-wide shutdown and seal all related finished products, or authorize an emergency recall of shipped products and pay the customer double liquidated damages.

think: Jiahe Pharmaceutical quality control: API purity below standard + mixed into 3+ production lines → plant-wide shutdown + seal all related finished products OR emergency recall shipped products + double liquidated damages.
memory: Jiahe Pharmaceutical Laboratory Quality Control System: If a quality inspector finds that the purity of a batch of active pharmaceutical ingredient is below the national standard, and that batch of non-conforming raw material has already been mixed into three or more production lines, then the quality director may order a plant-wide shutdown and seal all related finished products, or authorize an emergency recall of shipped products and pay the customer double liquidated damages.
